summary: Address Update & Re-geocode Feature Testing Complete. All backend API tests pass (9/9). Frontend UI verified: Stop Details modal shows editable address input, Save Address button, Re-geocode button. Save Address marks stop as needs-fix (badge visible in sidebar). Re-geocode endpoint works correctly.

issues: useNativeDriver not supported warning (cosmetic, JS fallback used)

critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx (lines 1500-1545): handleSaveStopAddressOnly correctly updates address via updateStop, sets geocode_needs_fix=true and geocode_status='pending_regeocode'
index.tsx (lines 1547-1587): handleRegeocodeSelectedStop correctly calls POST /api/stops/{id}/regeocode, updates modal state on success/failure

index.tsx (lines 2027-2075): Modal UI correctly renders address input (testID='stop-address-edit-input'), Save Address button (testID='stop-address-save-button'), Re-geocode button (testID='stop-address-regeocode-button')
index.tsx (lines 2036-2041): Needs-fix badge renders when geocode_metadata.geocode_needs_fix=true
Sidebar.tsx (lines 333-339 & 387-393): Needs-fix badge correctly displays in stop list items when geocode_metadata.geocode_needs_fix=true
server.py (lines 678-752): POST /api/stops/{stop_id}/regeocode endpoint correctly re-geocodes address, preserves old coordinates on failure, clears needs_fix on success
seed_data_creation: Test stops created with TEST_ prefix during pytest, cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: Address update and re-geocode feature fully tested. The 'needs-fix' badge is visible in sidebar after Save Address. Re-geocode button triggers geocoding API. All testIDs are present: stop-address-edit-input, stop-address-save-button, stop-address-regeocode-button, stop-needs-geocode-fix-badge. Frontend tested via Playwright browser automation.

feature_checklist.save_address_updates_address_not_coords: PASS - Backend test confirms address changes but coordinates unchanged
feature_checklist.regeocode_updates_coords_on_success: PASS - Backend test confirms coordinates update on successful geocode
feature_checklist.regeocode_keeps_old_coords_on_failure: PASS - Backend test confirms old coordinates preserved when geocoding fails
feature_checklist.sidebar_needs_fix_badge: PASS - Badge visible in sidebar for stops with geocode_needs_fix=true
